finalSummary:
Done — I created the artifact at:

`teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace/week-1-kpi-tracker.md`

It includes:
- Baseline + daily logging fields for all requested KPIs
- Explicit metric definitions
- Simple Week-1 target ranges aligned to the first-10-paying-users path
- Daily derived funnel checks and a week-end insight stub

Also posted the done signal to team chat: **GROWTH_INSIGHTS_READY**.
